meta.note: No 2027 lineup has been announced by any source as of this research (2026-07-07/07-08). Only dates and pre-registration are confirmed. Coverage repeatedly cites the 2026 edition's artists (Mosimann, Ofenbach, Agoria, Malaa, Oden & Fatzo, Axwell, Charlotte de Witte, Miss Monique, Steve Aoki) as historical context for what past editions looked like — these are NOT 2027 confirmations and are intentionally excluded from the artists list below.
